title: Subtasks' dependency should also be linked to the main items in the board and not just subtasks
excerpt: Something i’d really like to see is as the title says, a way to link subtasks’ dependencies to main items. Right now all I can link it to is to other subtasks based on date. Most of my workflow is automated and all depen…

posts.author: KaiJiang (Kai Jiang)
posts.cookedHtml: Something i’d really like to see is as the title says, a way to link subtasks’ dependencies to main items. Right now all I can link it to is to other subtasks based on date. Most of my workflow is automated and all depends on a single day that I create. That being said, it doesn’t make sense that I can’t link the subitems to it as well. As of right now, i’m just putting no date on it. If anybody knows a workaround, would love to know.

posts.author: graeme.renfrey (Graeme)
posts.cookedHtml: Completely Agree!!! Currently there’s no way to base the dependency of a SubTask on the completion of another Main Item. This would be a very common use case. Is there any update on this?

posts.author: alonbl (Alon Bar-Lev)
posts.cookedHtml: Dependency management is the basic feature for managing large project, every item/subitem should have dependency.
